name: Scoreboard for card games
description: Develop AceCounter, a high-fidelity card game scoreboard built with Tamagui v2 and Zustand for real-time score synchronization across active sessions. The interface must leverage YStack and XStack architectures with Separator components to manage player lists, utilizing pressStyle={{ scale: 0.97 }} and expo-haptics for highly tactile scoring interactions. Implement a BottomSheet with snap points for game configuration and Select components for choosing specific game rulesets, using ThemeInverse for high-contrast leaderboard highlights. Use Moti-driven declarative animations (enterStyle={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}) for smooth player entry/exit and Tamagui Toast to provide instant feedback on score updates. All navigation must be handled via Expo Router, ensuring a seamless, fluid experience with professional Feather icon integration.
